questions.question: 3 (a) Sulfuric acid is made from sulfur in a four-stage process. stage 1 Sulfur is converted into sulfur dioxide. stage 2 Sulfur dioxide is converted into sulfur trioxide. stage 3 Sulfur trioxide is converted into oleum. stage 4 Oleum is converted into sulfuric acid. (i) How is sulfur converted into sulfur dioxide in stage 1? ....................................................
